## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and assign a new content project for Engine, focusing on per diem rates across U.S. states.](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Saskia is tasked with revising and expanding an article on state-by-state per diem rates, ensuring minimal overlap with an existing federal GSA rate article](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [The project involves creating a pillar page and identifying topics for individual state/location pages](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Fact-checking and research are crucial, using official state websites and IRS.gov as primary sources](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [The deadline for the main article revision is Wednesday, with a list of potential individual pages to follow](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)

## Topics

### Project Overview and Goals

  - [Revise and expand an existing article on per diem rates across U.S. states](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Focus on state-to-state differences, avoiding overlap with the federal GSA rate article](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Create a pillar page and identify topics for individual state/location pages](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Improve the existing table, making it more coherent and informative](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Utilize search volume data from the content OS to prioritize topics](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

### Content Strategy and Organization

  - [Reorganize the existing content to better highlight state-specific information](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Consider creating separate sections or pages for states with unique per diem rules (e.g., North Dakota)](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Ensure consistency in how information is presented across states](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Incorporate product information from Engine where relevant, using existing documentation](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

### Research and Fact-Checking

  - [Use official state websites (e.g., Department of Labor, Business Division) as primary sources](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Consult IRS.gov for additional information and verification](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Ensure all information is current and accurately represented](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

### Deliverables and Timeline

  - [Main article revision due by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Provide a list of potential individual pages/topics for further expansion](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Consider creating a more effective table to replace the current "hot mess"](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)

### Client Context and Publication Status

  - [The project is not urgent from the client's perspective](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Aim to capture more traffic based on the success of a recent content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Current content publication is paused due to a new product launch by the client](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saskia to revise and expand the main article by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Create a list of potential individual pages/topics for further expansion](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Fact-check and research using official state websites and IRS.gov](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Improve the existing table for better clarity and information presentation](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Incorporate Engine product information where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Communicate with Carrie if any questions arise during the process](https://fathom.video/share/z7d95RwixtdDivWJxogJa7cjHuLibqmP?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
